ogTitle: Jackass Flat vs Jam Jerrup: Climate Safety

heading: Jackass Flat vs Jam Jerrup — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jackass Flat, Victoria and Jam Jerrup, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jackass Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Jam Jerrup (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jackass Flat or Jam Jerrup safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jackass Flat has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Jam Jerrup scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jackass Flat scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Jam Jerrup scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jackass Flat or Jam Jerrup?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jackass Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
